title: London City Voices — Jamulus & Zoom Rehearsal

title: Here's what zoom choral singing actually sounds like
why_included: Explicitly uploaded to demonstrate what native Zoom choral singing sounds like; 15 singers, all unmuted simultaneously.
why_not_post_produced: Complete rhythmic and harmonic dissolution from Zoom's 150ms+ latency is the entire point of the video; impossible to manufacture via editing.

title: Sing for Ukraine — Ukraine National Anthem (A cappella, Jamulus)
why_included: 60 international singers simultaneously on Jamulus; demonstrates upper scalability limits of server-centric NMP for large choral forces.
why_not_post_produced: Minor latency clustering and slight temporal smearing audible where groups of singers drag behind the conductor's pulse; inconsistent with post-produced alignment.
